'''Plat Hovath''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] of [[Fall Topas]] and the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Plat Mallar]]. He was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Polneye]] until his [[Death/Legends|death]] when the [[Yevetha]] [[Yevethan Purge|attacked]] it. In life, Plat was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
